subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O my God! All praise be unto Thee for having made me a lamp unto the worlds and a light unto them that are endued with knowledge [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک اللهم یا الهی لک الحمد بما جعلتنی سراج العالمین و ضیاء العارفین انت
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @praise and encouragement, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @Manifestation of God as sun
